evidence_items.evidence: T103D closed the deep-fix branch with persistent residual risk and semantic correctness not claimed.
Fixed six-row human review found no fully correct/supported target rows.
T105B low-overlap rates were similar across Baseline-AR, DFlash-R1, and CC-DFlash-R2 Light GPU.
T105B CC-DFlash-R2 Light GPU had 0 empty/malformed and 0 cap-limited/incomplete QMSum rows.
T105B CC-DFlash-R2 Light GPU completed QMSum but did not beat Baseline-AR or DFlash-R1 average e2e time.
